task_context.actionable_question: What specific risk signals are active for me right now?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Treat this as a checklist: list triggered flags first, then explain each using flag_value vs threshold, severity, flag_description, and recommended_action. Keep non-triggered flags brief.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: You currently have a low engagement score, which indicates that you may not be interacting with your course materials as much as needed. This can impact your overall performance. Other risk flags are not triggered, suggesting that there are no immediate concerns in those areas.

Insights: Low Engagement: Your engagement score is below the low-engagement threshold, which suggests that you might not be participating fully in your coursework.

Educational implications: Improving engagement can lead to better understanding and performance in your assessments.

Recommendations: high - Set a weekly study routine and interact with course resources before assessment deadlines. - This will help you stay on track and improve your engagement with the material.

explanation.summary: You currently have a low engagement score, which indicates that you may not be interacting with your course materials as much as needed. This can impact your overall performance. Other risk flags are not triggered, suggesting that there are no immediate concerns in those areas.

insights.title: Low Engagement
insights.description: Your engagement score is below the low-engagement threshold, which suggests that you might not be participating fully in your coursework.

evidence.context: Engagement score is significantly below the threshold.

educational_implications: Improving engagement can lead to better understanding and performance in your assessments.

recommendations.action: Set a weekly study routine and interact with course resources before assessment deadlines.
recommendations.rationale: This will help you stay on track and improve your engagement with the material.

confidence.reason: Data is complete and accurately reflects your current engagement status.

triggered_flags.flag_description: Engagement score is below the low-engagement threshold.
triggered_flags.recommended_action: Set a weekly study routine and interact with course resources before assessment deadlines.

non_triggered_flags.flag_description: Average score is below the pass threshold for this dataset scale.
non_triggered_flags.recommended_action: Review the weakest assessment topics and schedule tutor support before the next assessment.

non_triggered_flags.flag_description: This student has previous attempts, which can indicate accumulated difficulty or re-enrolment risk.
non_triggered_flags.recommended_action: Check prior attempt context and confirm whether the student needs a catch-up plan.

non_triggered_flags.flag_description: Submission punctuality is below the expected threshold.
non_triggered_flags.recommended_action: Use deadline reminders and submit drafts earlier to reduce late-submission risk.

non_triggered_flags.flag_description: Scores are maintaining an upward or stable trend across assessments.
non_triggered_flags.recommended_action: Compare recent feedback with earlier stronger work and intervene before the next assessment.

recommended_actions.recommended_action: Set a weekly study routine and interact with course resources before assessment deadlines.

task_output_contract: Use checklist style: triggered flags first, then non-triggered flags briefly.
For triggered flags, state flag_value versus threshold plus severity, description, support category, and existing recommended_action when supplied.
Do not invent new risk flags or new recommendations outside returned flag evidence.

triggered_flags.flag_description: Engagement score is below the low-engagement threshold.
triggered_flags.recommended_action: Set a weekly study routine and interact with course resources before assessment deadlines.

non_triggered_flags.flag_description: Average score is below the pass threshold for this dataset scale.
non_triggered_flags.recommended_action: Review the weakest assessment topics and schedule tutor support before the next assessment.

non_triggered_flags.flag_description: This student has previous attempts, which can indicate accumulated difficulty or re-enrolment risk.
non_triggered_flags.recommended_action: Check prior attempt context and confirm whether the student needs a catch-up plan.

non_triggered_flags.flag_description: Submission punctuality is below the expected threshold.
non_triggered_flags.recommended_action: Use deadline reminders and submit drafts earlier to reduce late-submission risk.

non_triggered_flags.flag_description: Scores are maintaining an upward or stable trend across assessments.
non_triggered_flags.recommended_action: Compare recent feedback with earlier stronger work and intervene before the next assessment.

recommended_actions.recommended_action: Set a weekly study routine and interact with course resources before assessment deadlines.

required_core_outputs.description: Explain each triggered flag using its value, threshold, severity, description, and recommended action when available.

evaluation_constraints.description: If no flags are triggered, state that explicitly.
Do not invent risk signals that are not present in returned flags.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
